query:
-- Set Scoop Duke DFW (the real account linked to Andrew's user id 150006) as exempt enterprise
UPDATE partners SET 
  tier = 'enterprise',
  subscriptionFee = 0.00,
  commissionRate = 1.0000,
  monthlyCommissionCap = NULL,
  isExempt = TRUE
WHERE id = 30001;

-- Also set the seed data Scoop Duke (id 723) as exempt enterprise for consistency
UPDATE partners SET 
  tier = 'enterprise',
  subscriptionFee = 0.00,
  commissionRate = 1.0000,
  monthlyCommissionCap = NULL,
  isExempt = TRUE
WHERE id = 723;

-- Verify
SELECT id, businessName, contactEmail, tier, isExempt, commissionRate, subscriptionFee 
FROM partners WHERE id IN (30001, 723);
